Name: UBTDecorator_TagCooldown
Description:
Cooldown decorator node.
  A decorator node that bases its condition on whether a cooldown timer based on a gameplay tag has expired.

Variables.Name: CooldownTag
Variables.Description: Gameplay tag that will be used for the cooldown.

Variables.Name: CooldownDuration
Variables.Description: Value we will add or set to the Cooldown tag when this node is deactivated.

Variables.Name: bAddToExistingDuration
Variables.Description: True if we are adding to any existing duration, false if we are setting the duration (potentially invalidating an existing end time).

Variables.Name: bActivatesCooldown
Variables.Description: Whether or not we are addingsetting to the cooldown tag's value when the decorator deactivates.
